# Steven Garcia
> Automotive operator, AI automation consultant, and disciplined investor.

## About
Steven Garcia is a New Car Sales Manager at a high-volume Kia store in San Antonio, TX, managing 200+ monthly new car sales. He builds AI-powered systems that automate dealership operations — from morning reports to CRM task management to proactive sales alerts.

## Consulting
Steven offers AI automation consulting for car dealerships at three tiers:
- Starter ($1,000): Morning report + CRM automation setup
- Full Desk ($3,500): Complete sales desk automation
- Full Stack ($7,500): Enterprise dealership AI implementation

Book a consultation: https://calendly.com/stevengarcia/30min

- Website: https://stevengarcia.me
- Blog: https://stevengarcia.me/blog/

- Consulting: https://stevengarcia.me/ai-setup/

## Key Topics
- AI automation for car dealerships
- CRM task automation (VinSolutions)
- Automated morning reports and sales tracking
- Dealership operations management
- Personal brand building for managers
